name: blockrate
description: Measure the actual block rate of third-party services caused by ad blockers and privacy tools.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target browser --format esm --minify && bun build ./src/index.ts --outfile ./dist/index.cjs --target browser --format cjs --minify && bun build ./src/react/index.ts --outdir ./dist/react --target browser --format esm --external react --minify && bun build ./src/next/index.ts --outdir ./dist/next --target browser --format esm --external react --minify && bun build ./src/sveltekit/index.ts --outdir ./dist/sveltekit --target node --format esm --minify && bun build ./src/tanstack-start/index.ts --outdir ./dist/tanstack-start --target node --format esm --minify
